scripts.setup: mkdir -p $CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/tasks && if [ -L tasks ]; then echo tasks_symlink_already_exists; elif [ -e tasks ]; then mv tasks tasks.backup.$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S) && ln -s $CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/tasks tasks && echo tasks_backed_up_and_symlink_created; else ln -s $CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/tasks tasks && echo linked_tasks_to_shared_dir; fi
